chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4479 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.18633/2025. 2. For orders on Office Objection No. 1 to 3. 3. For orders on Misc. No.18634/2025. 4. For orders on Misc. No.18635/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 16.09.2025. Mr. Bhagwan Das Meghwar, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. Learned counsel for the Petitioner files an Application/Statement reflecting that this Petition is not being pressed any further inasmuch as the Petitioner intends to approach the Grievance Commissioner appointed by the Wafaqi Muhtasib in respect of the NADRA for the purposes of redressal of the grievance. In view of such statement, the Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
